name: Export PDF Compress

releases.author: hunter00zb
releases.description:
## Changes

- **SVG support**: Embedded SVG images now render correctly in PDF via resvg (zoom=2)
- **Excalidraw guard**: Plugin now detects .excalidraw refs and shows reminder to convert to PNG/SVG first
- **Image search fix**: Vault root directory now searched for pasted images
- **Community store fix**: Name changed to "Export PDF Compress" (directory-safe)

## Files
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
- md_to_pdf.py
- excalidraw_to_svg.py
releases.name: v1.2.1 - SVG Export, Excalidraw Guard, Community Store Fix

releases.author: hunter00zb
releases.description:
## v1.2.0

### 新起点
- **全新仓库**: `hunter00zb/pdf-export-compress`（与旧 `obsidian-export-pdf` 完全独立）
- **插件 id**: `pdf-export-compress`（不含 obsidian，符合社区规范）
- 名称/描述中英双语

### 功能
- Markdown → PDF，支持图片自动压缩
- Python（reportlab + Pillow）渲染引擎
- CJK 字体支持（macOS 系统字体）
- Obsidian 维基链接自动解析
- 命令行独立使用

### 环境
- Obsidian >= 0.15.0
- macOS（Python 3 + reportlab + Pillow）
releases.name: v1.2.0 - Clean plugin id
